input_shape.bbox: xyxy pixel coordinates or normalized coordinates converted to image-relative ratios
input_shape.candidate: list of Detection-like records or final physical_damage targets

non_goals: promote guarded output without manual review
make case 101 pass by deleting evidence without audit

signals.purpose: flag boxes too large to represent one distinct target body
signals.risk: may suppress a legitimate very large building or grouped reference target
signals.source: adapted from v015c/v015d case 101 diagnostic thresholds

signals.draft_rule: at least 5 small boxes in a narrow y-band with regular x gaps
signals.purpose: flag many small boxes aligned in a regular row pattern
signals.risk: may suppress legitimate convoy/equipment rows if the image truly contains distinct vehicles

signals.draft_rule: small area plus no nearby standalone-body evidence; diagnostic-only in first simulator
signals.purpose: flag tiny boxes likely to be distant context, debris, smoke edge, or texture
signals.risk: body-evidence cannot be proven from geometry alone
signals.source: v015a/v015b cases 12, 28, and 19 side false positives
